articles.title: Bitcoin falls after Trump reportedly canceled Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's Iran-talks trip
Trump cancels Pakistan trip for Kushner and Witkoff
articles.summary: Donald Trump told Fox News on Saturday that US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer travel to Pakistan for talks with Iran. Trump said the trip was not worthwhile, claiming that the United States “holds all the cards” in the war and does not need to send a delegation on an 18-hour flight for unproductive discussions. He added that Iran is free to reach out to Washington at any time, stressing that his team would not make such long trips “to sit around talking about nothing.” This is the report from Fox News: President Trump just told me over the phone he has unilaterally cancelled Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan to meet with the Iranians. "I've told my people a little while ago they were getting ready to leave, and I said, 'Nope, you're not making an 18 hour flight to go there. We have all the cards. They can call us anytime they want, but you're not going to be making any more 18 hour flights to sit around talking about nothing'." This all appeared to be breaking down on Friday but the market didn't care, or didn't understand what was happening, or I'm missing something else. As far as I can see, we've reached a stalemate and the US is blocking Iranian ships and Iran is blocking everyone else's ships. Trump and his team have been touting all the tankers heading to the US to pick up oil but they're going to very quickly find out that prices will rise as supplies are drawn. The next question is: What breaks the stalemate? Can there be negotiations or are more bombs coming? We are still more than 24 hours until markets re-open but as it stands, this is bullish for oil and bearish for pretty much everything else. This article was written by Adam Button at investinglive.com.
articles.content: Donald Trump told Fox News on Saturday that US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer travel to Pakistan for talks with Iran. Trump said the trip was not worthwhile, claiming that the United States “holds all the cards” in the war and does not need to send a delegation on an 18-hour flight for unproductive discussions. He added that Iran is free to reach out to Washington at any time, stressing that his team would not make such long trips “to sit around talking about nothing.” This is the report from Fox News: President Trump just told me over the phone he has unilaterally cancelled Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan to meet with the Iranians. "I've told my people a little while ago they were getting ready to leave, and I said, 'Nope, you're not making an 18 hour flight to go there. We have all the cards. They can call us anytime they want, but you're not going to be making any more 18 hour flights to sit around talking about nothing'." This all appeared to be breaking down on Friday but the market didn't care, or didn't understand what was happening, or I'm missing something else. As far as I can see, we've reached a stalemate and the US is blocking Iranian ships and Iran is blocking everyone else's ships. Trump and his team have been touting all the tankers heading to the US to pick up oil but they're going to very quickly find out that prices will rise as supplies are drawn. The next question is: What breaks the stalemate? Can there be negotiations or are more bombs coming? We are still more than 24 hours until markets re-open but as it stands, this is bullish for oil and bearish for pretty much everything else. This article was written by Adam Button at investinglive.com.

active_items.title: 广义成长科技暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 新增资金优先回流宽基、红利低波或黄金，不继续堆成长仓。

active_items.title: 直接 AI 暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 停止新增同类 AI/半导体/港股科技，优先复核重叠和单仓上限。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位低于保险仓下限
active_items.action: 复核是否需要把新增资金的一部分补回黄金保险仓；仍需看价格、溢价和组合整体仓位。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位高于保险仓上限
active_items.action: 提醒不要把黄金当收益主攻；如继续上冲，优先复核是否只保留保险仓功能。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大涨
active_items.action: 只做保险仓复核，不追高；看美元指数和美债收益率是否同步支持。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大跌
active_items.action: 先确认是否是美元/实际利率驱动；如黄金仓位低于目标区间，再考虑是否分批补保险仓。
